Name: Korad
Flavor: Where the Versari keep their best work and their worst secrets.

Name: Dambar
Flavor: The continent's brain. It knows this about itself.

Name: Kansit
Flavor: Every trade route on the plains runs through here eventually. The city charges accordingly.

Name: Omara
Flavor: Far enough north to feel the Laker wind. Close enough to Dambar to feel the other kind.

Name: Chigan
Flavor: The factories never fully stopped. Neither did the people who depend on them.

Name: Droit
Flavor: Whoever holds the straits holds the conversation between east and west.

Name: The Shelf
Flavor: Someone built here because it was defensible. Someone else is always trying to prove them wrong.

Name: Tin Town
Flavor: It looks like nothing. That's the first mistake people make about it.

Name: Concordan
column9: not by accident. They've had offers.

Name: Erport
Flavor: The last stop before open water. Or the first
column9: depending on which way you're running.
